3D Viewer

The 3D Viewer in miraX enables visualisation of geospatial data in three dimensions, providing a more realistic representation of terrain, infrastructure, and water systems.

Capabilities

  • 3D terrain visualisation
  • Infrastructure representation
  • Simulation visualisation (e.g., flooding)
  • Camera navigation (zoom, tilt, rotate)
  • Integration with models and scenarios

Use Cases

  • Flood simulation visualisation
  • Infrastructure planning
  • Terrain analysis
  • Stakeholder presentations

Suggested Images

  • 3D terrain model
  • Flood simulation in 3D
  • City/infrastructure 3D view
  • Perspective vs top-down comparison
